required_preferences.fact: Initiates weekly video calls with his brother in Seattle to coordinate wedding planning and family logistics — discussions now directly involve schedules, travel, and shared responsibilities

supersedes.fact: Calls his brother in Seattle monthly for personal updates — avoids discussing work unless his brother brings it up

required_preferences.fact: Reschedules date nights to Saturday evenings when his wife has Friday shifts — may skip them if both have late weekend events

supersedes.fact: Schedules regular date nights with his wife every other Friday — never cancels except for emergencies

Actively participates in weekly leadership training sessions for merger integration — reviews all assigned materials on Sunday evenings to prepare for each Monday workshop

Delivers feedback only in one-on-one calls — never gives performance critiques during group sessions
